key_insight: ExTra improves language-model reasoning by turning the model’s own rollout diversity and entropy signals into exploration rewards and regeneration steps, addressing both low-diversity easy cases and all-wrong hard cases.
engineering_relevance: For RLVR systems, ExTra offers a practical way to increase both answer accuracy and coverage without changing the base model, using trajectory-level signals compatible with GRPO.
method: Novelty reward: adds embedding-based diversity bonuses after GRPO normalization to reward diverse correct solutions.
Entropy-guided prefix regeneration: scores partial trajectories with entropy and resumes exploration from promising intermediate prefixes.
GRPO-compatible exploration: extracts useful signals directly from the model’s own rollouts.
evidence_signal: Across six mathematical reasoning benchmarks, ExTra improved Qwen3-1.7B by about +5 points on pass@1 and +7 points on pass@16 over GRPO.
watch_item: Extra exploration and prefix regeneration may add training/inference complexity and depend on the quality of embedding and entropy signals.
paper_title: ExTra: Exploratory Trajectory Optimization for Language Model Reinforcement Learning
